title: red lentil lemon soup
ingredients: 2-2.5 cups split red lentils; rinsed and drained (optionally soaked with kombu)
instructions: Heat a large pot over medium heat and cook onion and carrot in oil until beginning to soften. Add garlic and ginger and cook for 2-3 more minutes. Add cumin and tomato paste and cook another couple minutes until lightly toasted.
Add broth, water, and lentils. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for about 30 minutes or until lentils are very soft.

Use an immersion blender to briefly blend the soup -- leaving it still very chunky. About half or more of the complete lentils should remain. Check seasoning and add the whole lemon's juice. Add more salt, pepper or additional lemon juice to taste.
notes: I often cook this to eat with the coconut rice. Together they make a filling meal.
